headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Axon Enterprise (AXON) After Its Strong Share Price Run?
summary: If you are wondering whether Axon Enterprise is priced fairly after its strong run, this article will walk you through what the current market price could be implying about its value. The stock last closed at US$570.49, with returns of 3.7% over 7 days, 26.4% over 30 days, 1.2% year to date and 14.3% over 1 year, while the 3 year and 5 year figures are very large. Recent attention on Axon Enterprise has focused on its long term share price performance and how the market is currently treating...

headline: 2 Nasdaq 100 Stocks to Own for Decades and 1 That Underwhelm
summary: The Nasdaq 100 (^NDX) is home to some of the biggest success stories in tech and growth investing. However, certain stocks in the index face challenges like profitability concerns, rising costs, or shifts in market trends.
